name: forgehold
description: Forgehold — a team-scale operating layer for developers.

scripts.sidecars:debug: cargo build --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml -p forgehold-jira -p forgehold-github -p forgehold-memory
scripts.sidecars:release: cargo build --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml -p forgehold-jira -p forgehold-github -p forgehold-memory --release
scripts.build:universal: pnpm sidecars:release && pnpm --filter @forgehold/desktop tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin
